title: MSMS Mock Trial
subtitle: President — August 2023 – August 2025
bullets: Revived the school's dormant Mock Trial program from the ground up, recruiting and leading 34 students through full regional and state competition seasons
Honored as Outstanding Attorney at both District and State levels, demonstrating advanced oral advocacy, witness examination, and legal reasoning under competition conditions
Coordinated with attorney coach on case strategy and with school administration to secure funding, manage team finances, and navigate competition logistics
